profile.title: Профиль сотрудника
profile.subtitle: Просмотр и управление информацией о сотруднике

agencyAccess.title: Доступ агентств
agencyAccess.subtitle: Предоставьте или отзовите доступ агентств на просмотр и редактирование этого сотрудника. Перевод из кандидата не предоставляет доступ автоматически — переключатели нужно включать вручную.

confirmRevokeAll.title: Отозвать весь доступ агентства
confirmRevokeAll.description: Отключение и Просмотра, и Редактирования полностью удалит доступ этого агентства. Продолжить?

confirmRevoke.title: Отозвать доступ агентства
confirmRevoke.description: Удалить доступ {{agency}} к этому сотруднику? Их пользователи сразу перестанут видеть запись.

compliance.title: Статус соответствия
compliance.empty: Нет данных о соответствии. Загрузите документы для отслеживания.

financial.title: Банковский и зарплатный профиль
financial.subtitle: Банковские и зарплатные данные, собранные на этапе кандидата, сохраняются после перевода.

confirmDelete.title: Удалить сотрудника?
confirmDelete.description: {{name}} будет удалён без возможности восстановления. Это действие нельзя отменить.

confirmDisconnect.title: Отключить от workflow?
confirmDisconnect.description: Этот сотрудник будет отключён от workflow. Существующий прогресс сохраняется.

confirmDisconnect.description: Этот соискатель будет отключён от workflow. Существующий прогресс сохраняется.

confirmDeleteDoc.description: "{{name}}" будет удалён из записей этого соискателя.

candidateApproval.pendingBody: Он был отправлен ответственным агентством и не может войти в workflow или быть переведён в сотрудники до утверждения.

confirmReject.title: Отклонить этого кандидата?
confirmReject.description: Он не войдёт в workflow. Это можно отменить позже, утвердив кандидата.

financialTab.title: Financial Transactions

notesTab.title: Notes & Comments

notesTab.writeCandidatePh: Write a note about this candidate…

promoteDialog.title: Promote to Candidate
promoteDialog.successBody: has been promoted from Lead to Candidate.
promoteDialog.successFooter: The profile is now visible to agency users, and the tier change has been recorded in the audit log.
promoteDialog.intro: will be promoted from Lead to Candidate. This grants agency users visibility. A holding agency will be assigned if configured.
promoteDialog.agencyHelp: The selected agency becomes responsible for this candidate and is recorded in Agency History.
promoteDialog.loggedNote: This action is logged and can be reviewed in Agency History.

convertDialog.title: Convert to Employee
convertDialog.subtitle: Converting {{name}} — all documents will be transferred and the applicant record will be archived.
convertDialog.candidateSubtitle: Converting {{name}} — all documents will be transferred and the candidate record will be archived.
convertDialog.applicantTransferSuffix: — all documents will be transferred and the applicant record will be archived.
convertDialog.candidateTransferSuffix: — all documents will be transferred and the candidate record will be archived.

rejectDocDialog.reasonPh: Explain why this document is being rejected…

step1.title: Personal Information
step1.subtitle: Your personal details and address
step1.photoHint: JPG or PNG, max 5 MB. Clear, front-facing passport-style photo required.
step1.photoRequired: A photo is required to complete your application.
step1.livedAbroadQuestion: Have you lived in another country for 6 months or more within the last 12 months?

step2.title: Contact Details
step2.subtitle: Phone, email and emergency contact
step2.whatsappQuestion: This phone number is also my WhatsApp number
step2.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

step3.title: Identification & Legal Status
step3.subtitle: Passport, ID and residency documents
step3.passportRequiredBanner: Passport upload is required for this position
step3.nationalIdRequiredBanner: National ID Card upload is required for this position
step3.nationalIdQuestion: Do you have a National ID Card?
step3.euVisaQuestion: Do you have an EU Visa?
step3.purposeOfIssuePh: Describe the purpose for which this visa was issued…
step3.euResidenceQuestion: Do you have an EU Residence Permit?
step3.workPermitQuestion: Do you have an EU Work Permit?

step4.title: Driving License
step4.subtitle: Your license details, categories and qualifications
step4.licenseRequiredBanner: Driving License upload is required for this position
step4.hasDrivingLicenseQuestion: Do you hold a driving license?

step5.title: Driving Experience
step5.subtitle: Your professional driving background
step5.trafficAccidentsQuestion: Have you been involved in any traffic accidents within the past three years?

step8.title: Skills & Qualifications
step8.subtitle: Languages, computer skills and certifications
step8.firstAidQuestion: Do you have a First Aid Certificate?

step9.title: Additional Information
step9.subtitle: Final details and preferences
step9.howDidYouHear: How did you hear about us?
step9.willingToRelocate: I am fully willing to relocate and remain flexible regarding location in alignment with the role and organizational requirements.
step9.additionalNotesPh: Anything else you'd like us to know...

step10.title: Document Uploads
step10.subtitle: Upload supporting documents (PDF, JPG, PNG — max 5MB)
step10.requiredDocsHelp: The following documents are required for this position. You cannot submit without uploading all of them.
step10.uploadHint: Upload clear scans of your passport, license, and qualifications.

step11.title: Review Your Application
step11.subtitle: Please review all details before submitting
step11.photoMissing: ⚠ No photo uploaded — please go back to Tab 1 and upload a photo (required).

fields.howDidYouHear: How did you hear about us

step11.declarationSubtitle: You must agree to all statements below before submitting your application.
step11.stmt1: I confirm that all information provided in this application is true, complete and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
step11.stmt2Pre: I consent to the collection and processing of my personal data for recruitment and employment compliance purposes in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.
step11.stmt3: I understand that providing false, misleading or incomplete information may result in my application being rejected or, if employed, in immediate dismissal.
step11.stmt4: I agree to provide my data and profile to other agencies, partners, or customers of the employer or the purposes of their selection process.
